subject: Local Tomcat validation config
fact: Database-backed servlet routes require the Tomcat process to receive the external config path through EVENTFLOW_CONFIG_FILE or the eventflow.config.file JVM property; otherwise AppBootstrapListener will not initialize ConnectionManager and DB-backed auth requests fail.
reason: Future backend phases will reuse the same Tomcat validation path, and this environment requirement is easy to miss from a narrow code sample while causing misleading 500s on DB-backed endpoints.
